2339560.name: My Singing Monsters - SummerSong Skin Pack
2339560.description:
Unlock the SummerSong Island Skin available on Earth Island. Alongside the cosmetic makeover to Earth Island, you'll receive the following permanent boosts to Earth Island upon purchasing.
  • 10% speed up to Breeding
  • 10% speed up to Baking

Once an Island Skin has been bought, its Boosts are automatically added to that Island. The Skin does not need to be activated to use the Boosts.

These Boosts only apply to regular Earth Island, and not Mirror Earth Island.

Note: You will need to exit and reopen your game for the Island Skin to appear in your inventory.
2339560.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
